meaning: adj.,得天独厚的,有利的,占有利位置的
examples: Some cities are always going to be more advantaged.
We aim to improve opportunities for the less advantaged in society.
Considering human capital as a characteristic of the population, however, all four countries were advantaged by the large percentages of their populations who could read and write.
It's always best to save as much as possible in a tax-advantaged investing vehicle.
Instead of investing in a fancier house, stuff your tax-advantaged retirement accounts--before the kids apply.
